If generic wave-shooter slop is your thing, go for it. Otherwise, save your money. Absolute trash.

reviews.review_title: A Blast from Start to Finish
reviews.review_description:
This VR shooter really delivers on entertainment. Whether you're stationed on a rooftop, riding in a moving truck, or blasting enemies from inside an elevator, every mission throws something new at you. The variety keeps things fresh and fun throughout.

The general character steals the show—his over-the-top expressions and gestures are genuinely hilarious and give the game a light, comedic touch. Even the side modes, like shooting mini soldiers, are surprisingly addictive and add to the charm.

The shooting mechanics are smooth and accurate, making it feel great to play whether you're new to VR or a seasoned gamer. It’s one of those games that’s easy to jump into and hard to put down. Great mix of action, humor, and solid gameplay.

I've played three missions so far, just love it. It's fun, the fast paced action, easy reload, great animations, explosions and just the simplicity of it. Wave after wave of non stop shooting, it's really addictive.

This game is for beginners to vr as to new to shooter games with its animated cartoony structure,  no realism to this so if looking for that then u want Pavlov,  contractors,  zero caliber, if u just want something to get ya started with little bit challenge and ok with non realistic cartoony look then u may like this one

https://bio.link/lordvalfromhell

A wonderful little game with endless enemies and shooting. the zombie horde mode is also fun for a while. I was particularly looking forward to the coop mode, but unfortunately you can't play the missions in coop, only another horde mode.
The enemy masses are extreme and it is a lot of fun to defeat them with the different weapons. Hopefully there will be more coop modes!

reviews.review_title: Best game ever. A hidden gem.
reviews.review_description: I’m a 56 yo female tech geek and this is my favorite shooter game. Easy to reload - just press A or bring the gun to your waist. My 23 yo son and I play in co-op mode￼. Several different levels and environments keep it very exciting.  The enemy’s bullets come at you in slow motion so you can dodge them so you don’t get killed right away like some of the more complex FPS games.￼ The sights on guns are realistic and help tremendously when killing your targets. Or you can instinctively shoot & do ok too, especially with closer targets. As a retired State Trooper, it emulates out live tactical training - Hiding behind targets, taking cover and taking down the enemies. ￼Sneaking around the mall and killing the intruders is super fun. You go in all these different stores and rooms and find different guns and shields and other weapons. Very exciting and engaging game.￼ As far as comfort, use the left joystick to teleport & the right for smooth walking or running and you will never get motion sickness.￼

I love this game. I play it every day. Im hoping for more coop levels soon! Its so much fun with other players! Cmon devs, add more coop levels and this game will be complete!!!!

reviews.review_description: This game has alot of potential. The zombie Horde mode is definitely the most fun if it had multiplayer mode for it. Please add multiplayer mode for zombie horde.

reviews.review_title: Excellent pick up and play shooter!
reviews.review_description:
From the outset this game is just so much fun to play. The aiming is spot on, the levels become increasingly more challenging as you progress but never seem to reach a point of frustration - you always feel like you can finish the level with just maybe one more try! It also has its own quirky charm and humour littered throughout ,(heads literally pop off and fly into the air when you score a headshot) 

It's a game that has obviously been crafted with a lot of love and care and it's genuinely one of my favourite things to play and one I keep returning too just for one more go!

Highly recommended
This is a nice fps shooter theres lots to do theres a nice zombie thats my favorite mode plz keep up the good work
